title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Petroleum - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bharat Petroleum - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Petroleum:
Bharat Petroleum is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
